synopsis: A facsimile of the journal and sketchbook that Anakin Skywalker kept while he was studying to become a Jedi Knight, this journal's insightful entries give fans intimate glimpses of Anakin's training, his hopes and fears, and his feelings about his fellow Jedi. Black-and-white sketches include sketch studies of Anakin's fellow Jedi, scenes from his training (such as lightsaber stances), and far-off planets visited while on missions with Obi-Wan Kenobi, and many drawings of Padmé Amidala. This Jedi's journal looks and feels as though it came right out of the Jedi Temple Archives. Blank spaces on
title: Anakin Skywalker: A Jedi's Journal
